events.label: assistant
events.text: Diagnosed the fault as an O/B reversing valve configuration mismatch — the thermostat's O/B output logic doesn't match the heat pump's actual energization convention (some manufacturers energize the valve in cooling via O, others in heating via B), causing the system to deliver heat when cooling is called. Written to `/app/answer.json` with `decision: fail`, `risk: high`, and corrective actions (verify mfr convention, reconfigure O/B setting, confirm valve energization with meter, cycle-test both modes).
